title: MineWar
description: This resourcepack replaces the vanilla music with Warcraft music.
body:
# Caution
I advise you to use [Constant Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/constant-music) to remove long pauses when the music does not play.
## Description and Music List
The resourcepack was created for more atmosphere when playing with the [Reign of Nether RTS](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts) mod.

[Listen music on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/DIuaD1GHLDk)
### Warcraft III: Reign Of Chaos
- Reign of Chaos
- Comradeship
- Sad Mistery
- Blackrock & Roll
- Lordaeron Fall
- Frostmourne
- Bloodlust
- Doomhammer's Legacy
- Temporary Alliances
- Blight
- Arcane Echoes
- Carrion Waves
- Arrival At Kalimdor
- Awakening
- Rise Of The Ancients
- Cinematic Suite
- Credits
### Warcraft III: Frozen Throne
- Main Screen
- Last Days Of The Scourge
- King Arthas Of Lordaeron
- In Pursuit Of Illidan
- Vengeance Of The Blood Elves
- The Orcish Hordes
- The Night Elves' Song
- Last Days Of The Alliance
### World of Warcraft
- Legacy
- Echoes of the Past
- A Call To Arms
- Elwynn Forest
- Dun Morogh
- Burning Steppes
- The Shaping of the World
- Orgrimmar
### WoW: Burning Crusade
- The Burning Legion
### WoW: Wrath of the Lich King
- Wrath of the Lich King
